# Jeevan AI -- Full Content Index

> Jeevan AI is a GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) platform that helps brands appear when AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and Google AI Mode answer buying questions. It monitors AI visibility, identifies gaps, and delivers structured content plans to fix brand positioning.

## About Jeevan AI

Jeevan AI was built by practitioners who ran real AI visibility audits before writing product code. The platform is based in India and serves B2B SaaS brands, D2C companies, agencies, local businesses, and any brand that needs to appear in AI-generated answers.

The core insight behind Jeevan AI: AI engines do not rank websites -- they recommend brands. The signals they use are different from Google: entity clarity, third-party citations, Reddit discussions, review site presence, structured data, and content that directly answers buying questions. Jeevan AI measures all of these and tells brands exactly what to fix.

## The 5 Buying Factors AI Uses to Recommend Brands

1. **Pricing Clarity** -- AI needs to understand what something costs to recommend it confidently
2. **Use Case Fit** -- AI matches brands to specific problems; generic positioning leads to wrong-category placement
3. **Trust Signals** -- Third-party citations, review sites, Reddit mentions, press coverage
4. **Ease of Use Evidence** -- Specific claims about onboarding, setup time, and user experience
5. **Quality Evidence** -- Case studies, outcomes, numbers, customer results
